title: Nilpotent graphs of genus one
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: Let R be a commutative ring with identity. The nilpotent graph of R, denoted by ΓN(R), is a graph with vertex set [Formula: see text], and two vertices x and y are adjacent if and only if xy is nilpotent, where [Formula: see text] is nilpotent, for some y ∈ R*}. In this paper, we determine all isomorphism classes of finite commutative rings with identity whose ΓN(R) has genus one.
